data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

An announcement from Info-Tech Systems Ltd ( (SG:ITS) ) is now available.

CGS International Securities Singapore Pte. Ltd. announced the purchase of 58,100 ordinary shares of Info-Tech Systems Ltd at a price of S$0.865 per share. This action is part of the stabilizing measures in connection with Info-Tech Systems Ltd’s listing on the mainboard of the Singapore Exchange Securities Trading Limited, which is expected to enhance the company’s market presence and offer potential benefits to stakeholders.

More about Info-Tech Systems Ltd

Info-Tech Systems Ltd operates in the technology industry, focusing on providing advanced software and IT solutions. The company is known for its innovative products and services that cater to a diverse range of market needs.

data.title: OneForce Holdings Announces Key Resolutions for Upcoming AGM
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

OneForce Holdings Limited ( (HK:1933) ) just unveiled an announcement.

OneForce Holdings Limited has announced the details of its upcoming Annual General Meeting, scheduled for September 19, 2025, in Beijing, China. The meeting will address several key resolutions, including the adoption of financial statements, re-election of directors, and the reappointment of auditors. Additionally, the company seeks shareholder approval for mandates allowing the buy-back of shares and the issuance of additional shares, which could impact the company’s market operations and shareholder value.

More about OneForce Holdings Limited

OneForce Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands and is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The company operates within the financial sector, focusing on providing various financial services and products.

data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Argeo AS ( (DE:8W20) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Argeo ASA, along with its subsidiaries Argeo Survey AS, Argeo Robotics AS, and Argeo Multiclient AS, has filed for bankruptcy, with proceedings officially opened by the Asker og Bærum tingrett on 24 July 2025. This development marks a significant shift in the company’s operations, potentially impacting its stakeholders and market positioning, as all inquiries regarding the bankruptcy are to be directed to Kco Advokater AS, the appointed trustee.

data.title: Hon Hai Precision Expands EV Investments with Strategic Acquisitions
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An update from Hon Hai Precision Industry ( (HNHPF) ) is now available.

Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd. announced the acquisition of shares in Foxconn EV Technology Inc. and Foxconn EV System LLC through its subsidiaries, PCE Paragon Solutions Kft. and Foxconn EV Technology Inc., respectively. The transactions, valued at USD 23.4 million each, aim to bolster Foxconn’s long-term investment strategy in the electric vehicle sector, enhancing its market positioning and operational capabilities in this growing industry.

More about Hon Hai Precision Industry

Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd., also known as Foxconn, is a leading global electronics manufacturer. The company is renowned for its production of consumer electronics, computer components, and communication devices, with a significant focus on the electric vehicle (EV) market through its subsidiaries.

An announcement from Daikoku Denki Co., Ltd. ( (JP:6430) ) is now available.

Daikoku Denki Co., Ltd. has completed the payment procedures for issuing new shares as restricted stock compensation, following a resolution by the Board of Directors on June 26, 2025. This issuance involves 20,943 shares of common stock at an issue price of ¥2,158 per share, raising a total of ¥45,194,994, and is aimed at compensating directors and executive officers, potentially strengthening the company’s governance and aligning management interests with shareholders.

More about Daikoku Denki Co., Ltd.

data.title: Hisense Announces Final Dividend Payment Details for 2024
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Hisense Home Appliances Group Co ( (HK:0921) ) has provided an update.

Hisense Home Appliances Group Co., Ltd. announced the exchange rate for the payment of its final dividend for the year ended December 31, 2024. The dividend will be distributed as RMB12.30 per 10 shares, with A Shares paid in Renminbi and H Shares in Hong Kong dollars. The conversion rate for H Shares is based on the market exchange rate, resulting in a dividend of HK$13.46764 per 10 H Shares. This announcement highlights the company’s commitment to providing returns to its shareholders and reflects its financial strategy in managing currency exchange for dividend payments.

More about Hisense Home Appliances Group Co

Hisense Home Appliances Group Co., Ltd. is a joint stock limited company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China. The company operates in the home appliances industry, focusing on the production and distribution of a wide range of household appliances.
